name: based-on-type-mismatch
description: Character style 'CharStyleB' with basedOn='ParaStyleA' (cross-type mismatch). CharStyleB defines italic + green. ParaStyleA defines bold + blue + size=32.
expected_behavior: Run: italic=on, color=00FF00 (from CharStyleB only). bold=off, color!=0000FF, size!=32 (basedOn ignored for cross-type).
current_status: GAP — basedOn type checking not implemented, cross-type inheritance may leak
